query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS template_configs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresaId INT NOT NULL,
  logoUrl TEXT,
  logoKey TEXT,
  corPrimaria VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#8B1538' NOT NULL,
  corSecundaria VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#FF6B35' NOT NULL,
  incluirPestel TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  incluirSwot TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  incluirOkr TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  incluirBsc TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  incluirGraficos TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  incluirRecomendacoes TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  rodapePersonalizado TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X2C2Km2DVLwNTk.c1886cf7bd86 --database GdPAuRogRcNPzV7ENB2n8s --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS template_configs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresaId INT NOT NULL,
  logoUrl TEXT,
  logoKey TEXT,
  corPrimaria VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#8B1538' NOT NULL,

  incluirPestel TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,

  incluirOkr TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  incluirBsc TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  incluirGraficos TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  incluirRecomendacoes TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  rodapePersonalizado TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
)
